posts.text:
BYE.


HuffPost Politics (@HuffPostPol)

California's governor sent the departing deportation chief a scathing "Good riddance" on X. huffpost.com/entry/newsom-bo…




— https://nitter.net/HuffPostPol/status/2034027376531685422#m

ENJOY, AMERICA!


Newsom News (@NewsomNews)

🚨PUFF, PUFF, PASS: “Newsom Declares That ‘Cannabis Is Now Legal’ After Trump Mistakenly Calls Him ‘President Of The United States’”

marijuanamoment.net/newsom-d…




— https://nitter.net/NewsomNews/status/2033926669657116713#m

To every kid with a learning disability: don’t let anyone — not even the President of the United States — bully you.

Dyslexia isn’t a weakness. 

It’s your strength.

NO THANK YOU, WE BELIEVE IN FREE ELECTIONS! 🇺🇸


Newsom News (@NewsomNews)

WOW! GAVIN NEWSOM WAS JUST NAMED PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES BY DONALD TRUMP!

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/NewsomNews/status/2033657788409516449#m

Donald Trump is a fraud and Texas knows it. He was so desperate he called up Greg Abbott and demanded he redraw the map to rig the election. Californians and Texans fought back together and we won.

Texas Democrats are turning out in record numbers. Together we can end the chaos, the corruption, and the cost-raising graft coming out of Trump's White House. Let's flip Texas.

Video

Good riddance. You ruined lives. Spread fear. And spewed hatred.

If you’re remembered, it will be as the smallest man who ever lived.


Camilo Montoya-Galvez (@camiloreports)

Outspoken Border Patrol official Gregory Bovino is retiring at the end of this month, sources tell CBS News.

Earlier in the Trump administration, Bovino was deployed to major cities across the U.S., to oversee sweeping and often controversial immigration raids.



— https://nitter.net/camiloreports/status/203358227655919

Fox News refuses to report the truth:

Texas and Florida are the REAL high-tax states.

Video

Thank you, Texas!!


Newsom News (@NewsomNews)

NEWSOM PACKS LABOR HALL WITH CONGRESSMAN CASAR THIS MORNING!







— https://nitter.net/NewsomNews/status/2033229708209401922#m

Miami — a night we won’t forget.

To the legendary father-daughter duo, @jorgeramosnews and @paoramos — thank you for welcoming us and for digging deep into the stories behind Young Man in a Hurry.

The Trump story is a corruption story.

Video

I met with a kid whose parents disappeared while they were at their jobs of 25 years.

Greg Bovino and Donald Trump’s secret police are terrorizing our communities.

Video
Join me in Miami, FL, with @jorgeramosnews and @paoramos to discuss my new book Young Man in a Hurry. nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1YxNrZRVX…

Tommy Tuberville proves to the world that a football hitting your head can turn you into a racist piece of shit. Congrats, Tommy.


Coach Tommy Tuberville (@SenTuberville)

The enemy is inside the gates.



— https://nitter.net/SenTuberville/status/2032087973810901496#m
Governor Newsom, First Partner make announcements on financial literacy, wealth access for women
Governor #Newsom on #Gas Price Spikes from #Trump's War with #Iran  #shorts #gavinnewsom #california
Governor Newsom announces historic funding for behavioral health treatment across California
Governor #Newsom's Early Fight for #MarriageEquality  #shorts #lgbt #lgbtq
#Trump fired #ICE Barbie  #shorts #kristinoem #noem #donaldtrump #news
Eat your heart out, #DonaldTrump  #shorts #newsom #gavinnewsom #kimmel #trump
#California Expands Mortgage Relief for #LAFire Survivors  #shorts #la #palisades #altadena
Announcing the 2026 Class of the California Hall of Fame!
Gov. #Newsom: #Trump Cares More About #Ballroom Than American #Soldiers  #shorts #iran #news
Governor #Newsom: Counties Must Follow #California's #Homelessness Laws  #shorts #gavinnewsom #news
NO THANK YOU, WE BELIEVE IN FREE ELECTIONS! 🇺🇸
Dyslexia isn’t a weakness. It’s your strength.

Donald Trump is a fraud and Texas knows it. He was so desperate he called up Greg Abbott and demanded he redraw the map to rig the election. Californians and Texans fought back together and we won. Texas Democrats are turning out in record numbers. Together we can end the chaos, the corruption, and the cost-raising graft coming out of Donald Trump's White House. Let's flip Texas.
Fox News refuses to report the truth: Texas and Florida are the REAL high-tax states.

Miami — a night we won’t forget. To the legendary father-daughter duo, @Jorge Ramos and @Paola Ramos — thank you for welcoming us and for digging deep into the stories behind Young Man in a Hurry. Grateful for the dialogue, and grateful for a city that shows up the way only Miami can. Young Man in a Hurry is available now: youngmaninahurrybook.com @Jennifer Siebel Newsom @Carlos_Eduardo_Espina
The Trump story is a corruption story.
I met with a kid whose parents disappeared while they were at their jobs of 25 years. Greg Bovino and Donald Trump’s secret police are terrorizing our communities.
The Trump story is one of corruption. Every family business deal, every foreign trip, every tariff, every envoy. This is a grift the likes of which we've never seen in the history of this country.
Donald Trump is all about destruction. Destruction is not strength. He’s not a builder. Any jackass can knock down a barn, it takes a skilled carpenter to build one. Donald Trump is a jackass.
Gone, but not forgotten.
